caption: The video features a woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green top with floral embroidery. She is seated against a plain black background, which helps to focus attention on her. The woman appears to be speaking or presenting, as indicated by her hand gestures and the microphone clipped to her shirt. Her expressions change subtly between the frames, suggesting she is engaged in delivering information or explaining a concept. The setting seems formal, possibly an educational or professional presentation, given the logo "NPTEL" visible in the corner of the screen.
